decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a yaws transmission model and varies treatment rounds and coverage across R0 values to determine eradication requirements.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete yaws-eradication planning application using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a stochastic transmission model with varied R0 scenarios to assess whether contact tracing and isolation can control COVID-19 outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 control-planning application using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models four intervention scenarios under three R0 values to compare their effects on SARS-CoV-2 outbreak size and progression.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Singapore intervention-planning application using R0 scenarios.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates instantaneous Rt and models how relaxing containment, and thereby raising Rt above 1, could generate a second wave.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 containment and second-wave planning application using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Simulates testing, isolation, tracing, and distancing strategies and evaluates whether they reduce the effective reproduction number below 1.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete SARS-CoV-2 control-strategy application using the effective reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models how alternative testing, isolation, screening, and contact-quarantine strategies reduce the effective reproduction number R.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 testing-policy application using R reduction.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits a transmission model and projects how tiered restrictions and alternative lockdowns change Rt, admissions, and deaths.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete England restriction and lockdown planning application using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an SEIR model to estimate the aggregate and measure-specific reductions in R0 produced by physical-distancing interventions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Greek lockdown evaluation using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models vaccination rollout jointly with relaxation of non-pharmaceutical interventions and predicts the resulting reproduction number R.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete UK vaccination and NPI planning application using R.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Links state social-distancing policies to a time-changing effective reproduction number and uses the model to assess mitigation of second waves.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete US social-policy application using a dynamic effective reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Maps combinations of school reopening, distancing, tracing, and other measures to predicted values of the COVID-19 reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete social-distancing policy-planning application using R.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives control reproduction numbers for population models, fits them to Shaanxi data, and uses them to recommend epidemic-control measures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 control application using the control reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops an analytical condition for optimally allocating limited vaccine to minimize the effective reproduction number Re.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an Re-based vaccine-allocation strategy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes cost-based heuristic control strategies targeted at reducing Re and computes lowest-cost control combinations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of reproduction-number-based control strategies.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a compartmental model and next-generation matrix to estimate HIV Re and project how care-continuum interventions would change it.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete US HIV-elimination planning application using Re.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a country-specific optimization strategy linking testing and quarantine rates to allowable reopening while maintaining a low reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a reproduction-number-targeted testing strategy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a pandemic model to compare timing and age targeting of heterologous vaccination under reproduction-number-dependent scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete US vaccination-intervention planning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models how measured population immunity would reduce R0 and whether immunity could block pandemic spread of five swine influenza viruses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete influenza pandemic-risk and immunity-planning application using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Simulates lockdown effects through reductions in the effective reproduction number and optimizes lockdown duration using health and economic outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete European lockdown-planning application using reproduction-number targets.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an SIR model to estimate the mpox basic reproduction number and derive the immunization level asserted to prevent spread.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete mpox herd-immunity planning application using the basic reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a temperature-dependent basic reproduction number to project climate-related epidemic potential, but does not model an intervention or control-planning strategy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No exact-concept control-planning lineage lead is supported.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an individual-based model and outbreak Re to compare chemoprophylaxis, ring vaccination, and age-targeted vaccination strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete meningococcal-outbreak control application using Re.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates mpox R0 and models how behavior change, isolation, and vaccination affected outbreak decline and future resurgence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete England mpox-control application using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates state-specific R0 and herd-immunity thresholds to derive vaccination coverage needed to prevent hepatitis A outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hepatitis A vaccination-planning application using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models the population impact and cost savings of expanding Paxlovid treatment under low and high effective-reproduction-number scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 treatment-planning application using effective reproduction number scenarios.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a transmission model to determine when passive surveillance can prevent resurgence as a function of the underlying reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete neglected-tropical-disease surveillance-planning application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates changes in the effective reproduction number associated with school holidays and evaluates border-screening effectiveness during H1N1.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Chinese H1N1 control-effect study using the effective reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Measures the reproduction number before and after Ebola interventions and quantifies its decline following treatment-unit admission and isolation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Liberian Ebola intervention-effect study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits an Ebola transmission model and estimates R0 and time-varying Rt to assess the effect of rapidly implemented controls.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete DRC Ebola control-effect application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates effective reproduction number trends and models the effects of vaccination and other containment measures during a measles outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Ohio measles outbreak-response study using R.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates changing Rt around Wuhan travel controls and uses it to assess transmission decline and outbreak-establishment risk.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete early COVID-19 control-effect application using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Calculates the effective reproduction number across five intervention periods and relates its decline to multifaceted Wuhan controls.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Wuhan public-health-intervention study using the effective reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares effective reproduction-number trajectories before and after containment measures across five countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cross-country COVID-19 control-effect study using Re.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses time-varying Rt to estimate the effects of major non-pharmaceutical interventions across 11 European countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete European NPI-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates containment timing from case data but the title and abstract do not explicitly state that a reproduction-number method was used.
decisions.lineage_evidence: No explicit exact-concept lineage lead.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates the reproduction ratio before and after Spain's lockdown to quantify the intervention's effect on transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Spanish lockdown-effect study using reproduction-number estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates Rt among the first 100 Hong Kong cases and relates its reduction to escalating containment policies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Hong Kong containment-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Infers reproduction numbers before and after interventions in 51 European countries to quantify NPI effectiveness.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multicountry intervention-effect application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Examines whether shortened restaurant operating hours affected the time-varying effective reproduction number in Hong Kong.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete restaurant-control evaluation using the effective reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Regresses effective reproduction number Rt on mobile-phone-derived travel reductions across two Swiss epidemic waves.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete mobility-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies EpiEstim to incidence data and compares Rt changes following stay-at-home orders, mask mandates, and vaccination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete southern-US policy-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Fits a nosocomial transmission model and estimates the change in R0 after a hospital contact-precautions policy.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hospital NPI-effect study using R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates reproduction-number changes around lockdown, stay-at-home management, and temporary hospitals and evaluates associated control effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Wuhan COVID-19 control-effect study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses EpiEstim to quantify Rt changes associated with mask mandates, school reopening, and other South Carolina policies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete state policy-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies the reduction in effective reproduction number following Taiwan's public-health and social measures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Taiwan control-measure evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses multilevel time-series models to estimate associations of mitigation stringency and mobility with the effective reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete US mitigation-effect study using the effective reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models how risk perception, protective behavior, and pandemic fatigue affect the weekly mean reproduction number and epidemic size.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Hong Kong behavioral-control application using the reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates Rt and its changes around mask mandates, mandate termination, vaccination, and mobility changes in Rhode Island.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Rhode Island policy-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a newly proposed estimator to show how strengthened and relaxed controls changed the COVID-19 effective reproduction number.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete British Columbia control-effect application for the assigned concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates Rt around variant emergence and policy changes and associates intervention initiation with lower transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Canadian intervention-effect study using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Longitudinally calculates HIV Re and modified Re to evaluate sequential expansion of treatment-as-prevention and PrEP programs.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV program evaluation using effective reproduction numbers.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies an immunity-adjusted reproduction-number model to retrospectively assess public-health and social measures in Korea.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete SARS-CoV-2 control-effect study using a time-varying reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses cluster data and a Poisson-Gamma mixture to study reproduction numbers under contact tracing, quarantine, and lockdown.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Karnataka COVID-19 control-effect study.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates that pertussis interventions reduced the effective reproduction number by 65% and likely brought it below 1.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete school-based pertussis intervention evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses EpiEstim and VaxEstim with R0 and Rt to estimate one-dose oral cholera vaccine effectiveness in Haiti and Cameroon.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete cholera vaccination-effect application using reproduction numbers.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Evaluates through analysis how data type, serial-interval observations, and case quantity determine the precision and usefulness of early R estimates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological evaluation of early reproduction-number estimation requirements.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents simple surveillance-based estimators and bounds for R that address selection and under-ascertainment biases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of reproduction-number estimation methods.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses Bayesian analysis of outbreak clusters to estimate MERS-CoV R0 and compare its pandemic potential with SARS.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete emerging-coronavirus transmissibility application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Combines cluster, incidence, genetic, and travel analyses to estimate MERS-CoV reproduction numbers with and without controls.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete MERS-CoV estimation and monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces surveillance-data estimators for R0, derives their asymptotic properties, and evaluates small-sample behavior by simulation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of R0 estimators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Extends an existing real-time R0 estimator to incorporate intra- and inter-age-group contact heterogeneity and evaluates convergence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a heterogeneous-contact real-time R0 method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies four reproduction-number estimation methods to outbreak notifications to assess maintenance of US measles elimination.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete measles-elimination monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates the reproduction number and projects four-week Ebola case incidence during an ongoing DRC outbreak.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete real-time Ebola estimation and forecasting application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates influenza Rt from weekly surveillance reports and compares it with existing epidemic-warning thresholds.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete seasonal-influenza surveillance application using Rt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses two serial-interval-based methods to estimate basic and effective reproduction numbers for multiple HFMD serotypes over time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HFMD estimation and monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a mathematical-statistical framework to quantify national and regional Ebola Rt and monitor its weekly trend.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete DRC Ebola monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates dynamic R0(t) across China to monitor infectivity and evaluate ongoing COVID-19 control strategies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 monitoring application using dynamic R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Bayesian approach to estimate provincial net reproduction-number dynamics and identify when transmission fell below 1.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete provincial COVID-19 estimation application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements likelihood, exponential-growth, and stochastic SIR approaches to estimate basic and controlled reproduction numbers across China.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 reproduction-number estimation application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Calculates current COVID-19 reproduction numbers for the United States and individual states and tracks their decline over time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete US COVID-19 monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a renewal equation and serial-interval data to estimate time-varying reproduction numbers in China, Hubei, and Wuhan in real time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete real-time COVID-19 estimation application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses EpiEstim on confirmed-case and onset-date series to calculate Rt and assess its utility for continuous policy monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Seoul COVID-19 monitoring application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Collates published H1N1 reproduction-number estimates and reconciles them with serosurvey estimates using mathematical models and age-specific analyses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Evidence synthesis explicitly diagnosing differences among reproduction-number estimates.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews case-notification estimators, their extensions, distinct interpretations, implementations, and remaining development opportunities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Methodological review providing interpretive and implementation guidance.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly critiques naïve use of R, emphasizing multiple definitions, method-dependent estimates, and data-dependent interpretation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit interpretive guidance on appropriate use of the reproduction number.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly discusses misinterpretations of R0 and Rt as population-risk measures and policy switches, including reporting-lag problems.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit guidance on interpretation and policy use of reproduction numbers.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a scoping review and user survey to evaluate applications, input-data problems, methodological challenges, software, and unmet needs in real-time Rt estimation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit diagnostic synthesis of real-time Rt methods and their limitations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Explicitly corrects the actual-reproduction-number concept and offers a likelihood-oriented framework for estimating R0 without exponential-growth assumptions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal methodological correction of a reproduction-number formulation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses theory and simulation to compare three estimators, demonstrate severe bias and non-identifiability, and recommend model-based Bayesian estimation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit benchmark and bias analysis of reproduction-number estimators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops polynomial-expansion methods for propagating R0 uncertainty through epidemic models and real-time forecasts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit theoretical development for reproduction-number uncertainty.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses dimensional analysis and formal notation to complete and adjust classical reproduction-number-related concepts and equations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal correction and adjustment of classical vector-borne-disease equations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Extends the next-generation-matrix approach to calculate R0 in interacting multi-host ecological communities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit theoretical extension of R0 computation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives an explicit network-level R0 for vertically and horizontally transmitted diseases in heterogeneous multispecies networks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a network-level reproduction-number formulation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives a simple analytic reproduction-number approximation for SIR cellular networks and evaluates it by simulation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for network R0 computation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Formally reconciles differing basic-reproduction-number expressions obtained from Jacobian stability analysis and next-generation matrices.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal correction of inconsistent R0 formulations.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Numerically evaluates when R0 is an imperfect predictor of final epidemic size in empirical temporal contact networks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance diagnosis of R0 as an epidemic-severity predictor.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives relationships between deterministic network reproduction numbers and stochastic extinction thresholds for vector-borne diseases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit theoretical development linking reproduction numbers to extinction thresholds.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces and validates a generalized-growth model for estimating effective reproduction numbers under subexponential epidemic growth.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a reproduction-number estimation framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a new infectious-disease population-attributable-fraction method based on the basic reproduction number and compares it with existing approaches.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development using reproduction-number theory.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a censoring-aware maximum-likelihood method to estimate and visualize R(t) and other parameters from contact-tracing data in real time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a real-time reproduction-number method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and simulation-validates an Approximate Bayesian Computation algorithm for estimating R0 from imported-case arrival times and surveillance data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a Bayesian R0 estimator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies and compares three R0 estimation methods on dengue outbreaks to evaluate their numerical behavior and agreement during initial growth.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative evaluation of R0 estimation methods.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes and validates an Rt estimator for dengue that incorporates temperature-dependent generation intervals.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development of a vector-borne-disease Rt method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses simulations and real data to demonstrate sensitivity of R0 inference to linear versus nonlinear mass-action structures.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit bias and sensitivity analysis of R0 inference.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Directly identifies common misrepresentations and misapplications of R0 and explains its dependence on model structure and assumptions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit cautionary guidance for estimating, reporting, and applying R0.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a theta-scheme spectral approximation for R0 in deterministic and stochastic age-structured epidemic systems and proves convergence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit numerical-method development for R0 computation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Compares six R0 estimation approaches on Canadian influenza data and evaluates performance using mean squared error.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit comparative performance evaluation of R0 estimators.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides improved real-time reproduction-number inference as the EpiEstim 2.2 R package and EpiEstim App, demonstrated on three outbreaks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software and interactive implementation of reproduction-number estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives a reproduction-number estimation formula for partially susceptible populations within a delayed dengue transmission model.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological derivation of a reproduction-number estimator.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Discusses overfitting, limited data, model-choice constraints, and maximum-likelihood approaches when estimating growth rates and R0.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Methodological guidance on challenges in basic-reproduction-number estimation.
